title.en: Research on Standard Design Methods for Open APIs
title.zh: Open API 标准设计方式研究

summary.en: A systematic study of Open API design for enterprise infrastructure platforms, covering HTTP semantics, OpenAPI Specification 3.1.1, security, authorization, quota and rate limiting, gateway architecture, business reuse, observability, and performance optimization.
summary.zh: 面向大型企业基础架构平台，系统研究 Open API 的 HTTP 语义、OpenAPI Specification 3.1.1、安全认证、授权、配额限流、网关架构、业务复用、可观测性与性能优化。

readingDirection.en: Read this when designing external APIs, OpenAPI contracts, API gateways, OAuth-based authorization, tenant quotas, rate limiting, observability, and performance governance for enterprise platforms.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在为企业平台设计外部开放接口、OpenAPI 契约、API 网关、OAuth 授权、租户配额、限流、可观测性与性能治理时阅读。
